final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing social media avatar for a content creator account focused on new energy vehicles, digital products, and lifestyle goods.

Style/medium: needs a clean, modern, globally neutral aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a square avatar format with a clear focal center
Subject: must include visual elements representing three content pillars: new energy vehicles, digital/tech products, and lifestyle goods — unified into a single cohesive icon or character
Scene/backdrop: needs a simple, uncluttered backdrop — exact treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a friendly, approachable, energetic atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant yet universally appealing direction — exact palette and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must avoid any symbols, gestures, colors, or imagery that carry negative cultural connotations in any major region (China, Middle East, Western markets); must work visually at small avatar sizes (circle-cropped)
Avoid: must avoid religious symbols, politically sensitive imagery, offensive hand gestures, culturally exclusive iconography, overly complex detail that degrades at small sizes
